title: Ragmar V
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Ragmar_V.jpg]] |option1=Orbit |image2=[[File:LAAT-iOnRagmarV.jpg]] |option2=Surface |name=Ragmar V |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the sector in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] as defined by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Karthakk sector/Legends|Karthakk sector]] |system=[[Ragmar system/Legends|Ragmar system]] |coordinates=Q-17 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} |orbited= |position= |moons=At least 2 |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate=Arid |gravity= |terrain=*Canyons *[[Desert/Legends|Desert]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna=*[[Lizard/Legends|Lizards]] *[[Bird/Legends|Birds]] |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=*[[Human/Legends|Human]] *[[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] *[[Bith/Legends|Bith]] *[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] *[[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] *[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] *[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] *[[Gran/Legends|Gran]] *[[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] *[[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] *[[Nuknog/Legends|Nuknog]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|You landed on the wrong planet, friend. The Republic isn't welcome here|[[Gaan]], to [[Joc Sah]]|}} '''Ragmar V''' was a barren, [[Desert/Legends|desert]]-coated [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its population center was an outpost of outcasts of various [[Species/Legends|species]], who were opposed to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Description== {{Quote|There's a primitive settlement a few klicks from here. Several life forms detected, sir|[[Remy (clone trooper)|Remy]], to Joc Sah|}} Ragmar V was an underdeveloped and arid world with a sparse population. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had a [[Atmosphere/Legends|breathable atmosphere]]. There were no large [[City/Legends|cities]] on Ragmar V; the locals lived in small villages. The fauna of Ragmar V consisted of small green [[Lizard/Legends|lizards]] that inhabited the canyons, as well as solitary [[Bird/Legends|birds]] circling above the surface. ==History== {{Quote|I was just hoping for some real action for my first solo mission.''"
"''Sometimes the smallest fights become the biggest battles. Stay on your guard.|Joc Sah and his master, [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]]|}} During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a gang of criminals operated on Ragmar V, led by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Gaan]].{{CSWECite|I|305|Gaan}} Among the members of Gaan’s gang were representatives of many different [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], [[Bith/Legends|Bith]], [[Nuknog/Legends|Nuknogs]], [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]], and many others. The gang was highly dissatisfied with the rule of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and fought against it during the conflict. [[File:SettlementOnRagmar.jpg|thumb|left|280px|The outpost of outcasts on Ragmar V]] In [[19 BBY/Legends|the final year]] of the war, Republic forces were dispatched to Ragmar under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Joc Sah]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] intended to seize Ragmar, as the planet served as a key staging point for the Republic’s planned assault on a nearby [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. Joc and his small squad of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] landed in one of the planet’s deserts aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] and were immediately attacked by bandits from Gaan’s gang. Discovering a small settlement that also served as the gang’s headquarters, Sah and his [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] rushed toward it. A [[Battle of Ragmar V|battle]] nearly erupted between them and Gaan, but before fighting broke out, the Padawan’s soldiers received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and opened fire on their commander instead of the bandits. Fortunately for Joc, Gaan and his men sided with him and defeated the attackers. Soon after their victory, the gang, together with the Padawan who had joined them, took shelter in one of Ragmar’s deserts.{{CSWECite|III|123|Sah, Joc}} ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ragmar V}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Ragmar V }} [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Karthakk sector locations]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Type I atmosphere planets]] [[Category:Desert planets]]
